SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.java

Class JkJavaProcess

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.system.JkAbstractProcess<JkJavaProcess>
dev.jeka.core.api.java.JkJavaProcess
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class JkJavaProcess extends JkAbstractProcess<JkJavaProcess>
Offers fluent interface for launching Java processes.

  • Constructor Details

  • Method Details

    • ofJava

      public static JkJavaProcess ofJava(String className)
      Creates a process launching the current JDK java command on the specified class.

    • ofJavaFromJdk

      public static JkJavaProcess ofJavaFromJdk(Path jdkHome, String className)
      Creates a process launching the current JDK java command on the specified class.

    • ofJavaJar

      public static JkJavaProcess ofJavaJar(Path jar, String className)
      Creates a process launching the current JDK java command to execute the specified jar.
      Parameters:
      className - Can be null.

    • ofJavaJarFromJdk

      public static JkJavaProcess ofJavaJarFromJdk(Path javaHome, Path jar, String className)
      Creates a JkJavaProcess instance to execute a specified JAR file using a Java runtime located at the specified javaHome. A fully qualified main class name can also be provided.

    • ofJavaJar

      public static JkJavaProcess ofJavaJar(Path jar)
      Creates a process launching the current JDK java command to execute the specified jar. This method assumes that a main method is specified in the jar manifest.

    • ofJavaJarFromJdk

      public static JkJavaProcess ofJavaJarFromJdk(Path JdkHome, Path jar)
      Creates a JkJavaProcess instance to execute a specified JAR file using a Java runtime located at the specified JDK home. This method assumes that a main method is specified in the JAR manifest.
      Parameters:
      JdkHome - the path to the Java Development Kit (JDK) home directory, used to locate the Java runtime environment
      jar - the path to the JAR file to be executed
      Returns:
      a JkJavaProcess instance configured to execute the specified JAR file using the Java runtime located at the specified JDK home

    • addAgent

      public JkJavaProcess addAgent(Path agentLib, String agentOption)
      Adds the specified agent to the command line.
      Parameters:
      agentOption - Can be null

    • addJavaOptions

      public JkJavaProcess addJavaOptions(Collection<String> options)
      Adds the specified java options to the command line. Options are command line parameters prepending the Java class parameter.

    • addJavaOptionsIf

      public JkJavaProcess addJavaOptionsIf(boolean condition, String... options)
      Adds the specified Java options to the command line if the given condition is true.
      See Also:
      • addJavaOptions(Collection)

    • addJavaOptions

      public JkJavaProcess addJavaOptions(String... options)
      Adds the specified java options to the command line.
      See Also:
      • addJavaOptions(Collection)

    • setClasspath

      public JkJavaProcess setClasspath(Iterable<Path> paths)
      Convenient method to set classpath option.

    • addSystemProperty

      public JkJavaProcess addSystemProperty(String key, String value)
      Adds a system property to the command line parameters.

    • setInheritSystemProperties

      public JkJavaProcess setInheritSystemProperties(boolean inheritSystemProperties)
      Sets whether the process should inherit system properties from the parent process.

    • copy

      public JkJavaProcess copy()
      Creates a copy of the current JkJavaProcess instance with the same properties.
      Overrides:
      copy in class JkAbstractProcess<JkJavaProcess>

    • customizeCommand

      protected void customizeCommand()
      Description copied from class: JkAbstractProcess
      Modifies the command and its execution parameters.

      This method provides a way for subclasses to adjust the process before it is run.

      Overrides:
      customizeCommand in class JkAbstractProcess<JkJavaProcess>
